translations.it: Mi piace il tuo foulard rosso.
translations.yue: 我鍾意你嗰條紅色披肩。
translations.he: אני אוהב את המטפחת האדומה שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi thích chiếc khăn choàng đỏ của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik vind je rode sjaal mooi.
translations.hi: मुझे तुम्हारा लाल स्कार्फ पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba mi się twoja czerwona chusta.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει το κόκκινο μαντήλι σου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker det røde sjalet ditt.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om din röda sjal.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi tvůj červený šátek.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide dit røde sjal.
translations.ja: あなたの赤いショールが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present 1st person singular; the clitic subject pronoun 'Je' is elided to 'J'' before a vowel.
Adverb modulating the degree of liking; intensifies the verb 'aime' in the idiom 'aimer bien'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; determinates the noun 'fichu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'aime'.
Adjective of color modifying 'fichu'; invariable in gender, agrees in number.

sentences.target: Elle noue son fichu avant de sortir.
sentences.reading: /ɛl nu sɔ̃ fi.ʃy avɑ̃ də sɔʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: Elle noue son fichu avant de sortir.
translations.ipa: /ɛl nu sɔ̃ fi.ʃy avɑ̃ də sɔʁtiʁ/
translations.en: She ties her kerchief before going out.
translations.es: Ella se ata el pañuelo antes de salir.
translations.de: Sie bindet ihr Kopftuch, bevor sie ausgeht.
translations.it: Lei si annoda il foulard prima di uscire.
translations.ko: 그녀는 밖에 나가기 전에 두건을 묶는다.
translations.ru: Она завязывает свой платок перед выходом.
translations.pt: Ela amarra o lenço antes de sair.
translations.he: היא קושרת את המטפחת לפני שהיא יוצאת.
translations.vi: Cô ấy buộc khăn trùm đầu trước khi ra ngoài.
translations.nl: Ze knoopt haar hoofddoek vast voordat ze naar buiten gaat.
translations.uk: Вона зав’язує свою хустку перед виходом.
translations.hi: वह बाहर जाने से पहले अपना रूमाल बांधती है.
translations.pl: Ona wiąże swoją chustę przed wyjściem.
translations.el: Δένει το μαντήλι της πριν βγει έξω.
translations.nb: Hun knytter tørkleet sitt før hun går ut.
translations.sv: Hon knyter sin sjal innan hon går ut.
translations.ro: Ea îşi leagă baticul înainte de a ieşi.
translations.cs: Před odchodem si zaváže svůj šátek.
translations.da: Hun binder sit tørklæde, før hun går ud.
translations.fi: Hän sitoo huivinsa ennen kuin lähtee ulos.
translations.ja: 彼女は出かける前にスカーフを結ぶ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
Main verb in present 3rd person singular; takes 'fichu' as its direct object.
3rd person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular; determinates 'fichu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'noue'.
Preposition starting the complex prepositional phrase 'avant de' that introduces an infinitive.
Preposition linking 'avant' to the infinitive 'sortir'.
Infinitive verb governed by the prepositional locution 'avant de'.

sentences.target: On cherche un fichu léger pour l'été.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fi.ʃy leʒe puʁ l'ete/

translations.fr: On cherche un fichu léger pour l'été.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fi.ʃy leʒe puʁ l'ete/
translations.en: We’re looking for a light scarf for summer.
translations.es: Buscamos un pañuelo ligero para el verano.
translations.de: Wir suchen ein leichtes Tuch für den Sommer.
translations.it: Cerchiamo un foulard leggero per l’estate.
translations.ko: 우리는 여름에 쓸 가벼운 스카프를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一条夏天用的轻薄丝巾。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊一條夏天用嘅輕薄絲巾。
translations.ru: Мы ищем лёгкий платок на лето.
translations.pt: Estamos à procura de um lenço leve para o verão.
translations.tr: Yaz için hafif bir fular arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một chiếc khăn choàng nhẹ cho mùa hè.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن وشاح خفيف للصيف.
translations.nl: We zoeken een lichte sjaal voor de zomer.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо легку хустку на літо.
translations.hi: हम गर्मियों के लिए हल्का स्कार्फ ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε ένα ελαφρύ φουλάρι για το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et lett skjerf til sommeren.
translations.id: Kami mencari syal ringan untuk musim panas.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en lätt scarf för sommaren.
translations.ro: Căutăm o eșarfă ușoară pentru vară.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et let tørklæde til sommeren.
translations.ja: 夏用の軽いスカーフを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun commonly used for 'we'; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in present 3rd person singular agreeing with 'On'; takes 'fichu' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determinates 'fichu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adjective (masculine singular) modifying 'fichu'.
Preposition introducing a purpose or intended time ('for the summer').
Noun (masculine singular) as object of 'pour'; preceded by elided definite article 'l'' (< le).

sentences.target: Ce fichu te va très bien.

translations.fr: Ce fichu te va très bien.
translations.en: That scarf suits you very well.
translations.es: Ese pañuelo te queda muy bien.
translations.de: Dieses Tuch steht dir sehr gut.
translations.it: Quel foulard ti sta molto bene.
translations.ko: 그 스카프가 너에게 정말 잘 어울려.
translations.pt: Esse lenço te fica muito bem.
translations.vi: Chiếc khăn ấy rất hợp với bạn.
translations.nl: Die sjaal staat je heel goed.
translations.hu: Ez a kendő nagyon jól áll neked.
translations.hi: वह स्कार्फ तुम पर बहुत जंचता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το μαντήλι σου ταιριάζει πολύ.
translations.nb: Det sjalet kler deg veldig godt.
translations.sv: Den där sjalen passar dig väldigt bra.
translations.ro: Eșarfa aceea îți vine foarte bine.
translations.da: Det sjal klæder dig rigtig godt.
translations.fi: Se huivi sopii sinulle todella hyvin.
translations.ja: そのスカーフはあなたにとてもよく似合います。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determinates the noun 'fichu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'va'.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object) placed before the verb; complement of 'va' in the idiom 'aller à quelqu'un' ('to suit someone').
Main verb in present 3rd person singular; here means 'to suit/fit' with an indirect object.
Adverb intensifying 'bien'.
Adverb modifying 'va' ('to suit well').
